name: Camping Lantern Rechargeable
description: 1000-lumen LED lantern with 4 brightness modes, 360° lighting, IPX6 waterproof, and built-in USB-A output.

reviews.title: Bright and reliable lantern
reviews.reviewText: This lantern puts out a lot of light and the different modes are genuinely useful. I used it on a weekend camping trip and the battery lasted longer than expected. Great emergency light too.

reviews.title: Perfect for camping and power outages
reviews.reviewText: Solid build, bright output, and convenient USB charging. The power bank function came in handy for topping up my phone. I am very pleased with this lantern.

reviews.title: Very useful outdoor light
reviews.reviewText: Strong brightness and easy controls. It is a little larger than ultra-compact lanterns, but the performance makes up for it. A dependable camping accessory.
